scenarios.name: jwt-vs-sessions
scenarios.prompt: What are the trade-offs between JWT and session-based authentication for a Node.js API?
scenarios.description: Researcher must answer directly with trade-offs for both options

scenarios.name: node-concurrency
scenarios.prompt: How does Node.js handle concurrency compared to traditional multi-threaded servers?
scenarios.description: Researcher must explain event loop model with trade-offs
